taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Full-stack web development, Frontend development, Backend development, React, Typescript
skill_match_scores: Full-stack web development:1.0, Frontend development:0.5, Backend development:1.0, React:1.0, Typescript:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in computer science or a related field, 7+ years of experience in developing scalable, reliable, and secure full-stack web applications, Strong proficiency in frontend and backend development technologies, Experience building or integrating with Contentful (or similar headless CMS), Deep knowledge of React, Typescript, and Next.js, Ability to translate high-level requirements into a detailed execution plan, A product-minded builder who's comfortable partnering with Product and Growth teams to experiment, iterate, and move quickly, Prior experience working at a high-growth startup or tech company
core_responsibilities: You’ll own the marketing website from infrastructure to interface, leading its architecture, CI/CD pipeline, and performance optimization to ensure a fast, reliable, and scalable experience, Build and maintain the Typeface.ai marketing website, ensuring every page is fast, stable, and visually stunning, Turn Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive experiences that delight and engage our audience, You’ll collaborate closely with our design team to translate high-fidelity wireframes into polished, production-ready work, Develop and maintain components in Contentful, integrating content models, and reusable sections aligned with design system standards, Own the web CI/CD pipeline by managing build and deployment automation through Docker, Azure Pipelines, and Cloud Run, Collaborate cross-functionally with Product and Engineering to help shape Typeface’s Web Agent roadmap using real-world insights from the marketing website, Drive site performance and SEO best practices, ensuring pages are optimized for speed, accessibility, and conversion, Improve and refactor the codebase to move toward best-practice Next.js Server Components and unify styling systems
job_summary: Typeface is a company that helps major brands transition to personalized marketing campaigns quickly. The Senior Web Engineer will be responsible for owning and optimizing the marketing website, ensuring a fast, reliable, and visually appealing user experience while collaborating with design and engineering teams.
